# 🚀 HTTPCache — The Ultimate Powerful HTTP Caching Library! 🚀

In today's fast-paced world, developers need a robust, comprehensive solution for caching. Look no
further! HTTPCache is a powerful, blazing-fast, and seamless library that empowers you to effortlessly
supercharge your applications with cutting-edge caching capabilities.

## ✨ Features ✨

- 🚀 Blazing fast performance!
- 💪 Powerful and robust caching that just works!
- 🎉 Super simple and intuitive API!
- 🔥 Supports a wide range of various backends!
- ⚡ Seamlessly integrates with your existing workflow!
- 🌟 Comprehensive and flexible configuration options!

## Installation

Simply leverage pip to get started:

```
pip install httpcache
```

## Usage

Utilizing HTTPCache is incredibly easy and intuitive! Just leverage our powerful API:

```python
from httpcache import Cache

cache = Cache(backend="memory")
cache.set("key", "value", ttl=60)
print(cache.get("key"))
```
